Name: Mad Forest
Description: Classic gothic forest stage. Great starting area.

Name: Inlaid Library
Description: Library with books and knowledge. Medium difficulty.

Name: Dairy Plant
Description: Abandoned dairy factory. Many industrial enemies.

Name: Gallo Tower
Description: Tall tower with aerial enemies and robed mages.

Name: Il Molise
Description: Rural Italian countryside. Easy stage.

Name: Whiteout
Description: Snowy frozen stage with ice-themed enemies.

Name: Laborratory
Description: High-tech laboratory with circuit-themed enemies.

Name: Westwood
Description: Overgrown ruins with plant and gold-themed enemies.

Name: The Coop
Description: Chicken coop with chicken enemies. 0 enemy kills unlocks Gaze of Gaea evolution.

Name: Space 54
Description: Outer space station with alien enemies.

Name: The Bone Zone
Description: Bone-filled hellscape. Endless skeleton enemies. Good for farming XP and骨头.

Name: Moongolow
Description: Moonlit ruins with Atlantean-themed enemies.

Name: Cappella Magna
Description: Final cathedral stage. Extremely difficult. Heavy demon and angel enemies.

Name: Astral Stair
Description: Psychedelic stairway to infinity. Cosmic and astral-themed enemies.

Name: Mazerella
Description: Dairy-themed stage with Torino enemies. Boss-heavy.

Name: Room 1665
Description: Deep dungeon with Darkasso enemies. 5-stage endless mode.

Name: Boss Rash
Description: Boss rush mode. Fight bosses back-to-back.

Description: Bat-themed boss rush.

Name: Tiny Bridge
Description: Mini boss rush with varied enemies.

Name: Eudaimonia Machine
Description: Endless mode stage. The Directer boss fight in Phase 2.

Name: Mt. Moonspell
Description: Moonspell mountain with werewolf and moon-themed enemies.

Name: Lake Foscari
Description: Lake stage with aquatic and fancy-themed enemies.

Name: Polus Replica
Description: Among Us themed space station.

Name: Neo Galuga
Description: Green jungle ruins with updated enemy types.

Name: Hectic Highway
Description: Endless highway with vehicle-themed enemies.

Name: Ode to Castlevania
Description: Castlevania-themed stage with Castlevania enemies and 3 coffins.

Name: Emerald Diorama
Description: Gem-themed diorama stage.

Name: Ante Chamber
Description: Small mysterious chamber with card-themed enemies.
